## What Falltax Us is

falltax-us · sovereign single-file tool · @ai-native-solutions

## Estate context

Falltax Us is one of 1500+ MIT-signed sovereign tools in the AI-Native Solutions estate. Every tool is browser-native where possible, Ed25519-verifiable, forkable end-to-end. The estate front door is https://ai-nativesolutions.com.
